parameters.body: ={{ (() => { const soundId = String($('Validate Init Context').item.json.tiktokSoundId || '').trim(); const postInfo = { title: $('Validate Init Context').item.json.title, privacy_level: $('Validate Init Context').item.json.selectedPrivacyLevel || 'SELF_ONLY', disable_duet: true, disable_comment: false, disable_stitch: true, video_cover_timestamp_ms: 1000 }; if (soundId) postInfo.music_info = { music_id: soundId }; return JSON.stringify({ post_info: postInfo, source_info: { source: 'FILE_UPLOAD', video_size: Number($('Validate Video Headers').item.json.videoSize), chunk_size: Number($('Validate Video Headers').item.json.videoSize), total_chunk_count: 1 } }); })() }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, contentIdeaId: $json.contentIdeaId, publishId: $json.publishId, uploadUrl: $json.uploadUrl, status: 'init_done' } }}
